metadata.documentation: Launch Wizard offers a guided way of sizing, configuring, and deploying Amazon Web Services resources for third party applications, such as Microsoft SQL Server Always On and HANA based SAP systems, without the need to manually identify and provision individual Amazon Web Services resources.

CreateDeployment.documentation: Creates a deployment for the given workload. Deployments created by this operation are not available in the Launch Wizard console to use the Clone deployment action on.

exceptions.documentation: You have exceeded an Launch Wizard resource limit. For example, you might have too many deployments in progress.
